TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Darrell Allums mhtu squ 1958 neng 9 gac 12 nici squ California. musa' mgsemong ppzyuwi' na mu' mari . kin wagiq nya ga 206 cm kin'usuw nya ga 100 kiro. socgyo sa California raygaku na UCLA. 1980 neng musa sa pwazyaw giqas na sensyn NBA. minmagal mthgiru' lga.maki' squw te 11 binkgan lalu' niya' ruw wal galun kya na Dallas Mavericks la. ryax niya' knaki' nya' sa Dallas Mavericks qutux kawas qasa ga, 2.7 tinsu' sinbil niya', 3.0 quw qnul niya' mari' sa zik na zyawa', 1.1 quw niwan rnaw niya' sa gluw naha' quw sinbil pincyuwagan niya' kya. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *arrell allums~ɕ mħtu s~ɕqu **** neŋ * ɣaʦ~ʨ ** niʦ~ʨi s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨali*ornia. mus~ɕaʔ mɣs~ɕemoŋ ppzjuwiʔ na muʔ mari . kin waɣiq nja ɣa *** ʦ~ʨm kinʔus~ɕuw nja ɣa *** kiro. s~ɕoʦ~ʨɣjo s~ɕa ʦ~ʨali*ornia rajɣaku na uʦ~ʨla. **** neŋ mus~ɕa s~ɕa pwazjaw ɣiqas~ɕ na s~ɕens~ɕjn nβa. minmaɣal mtħɣiruʔ lɣa.makiʔ s~ɕquw te ** βinkɣan laluʔ nijaʔ ruw wal ɣalun kja na *allas~ɕ ma*eriʦ~ʨks~ɕ la. rjax nijaʔ knakiʔ njaʔ s~ɕa *allas~ɕ ma*eriʦ~ʨks~ɕ qutux kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa ɣa, *.* tins~ɕuʔ s~ɕinβil nijaʔ, *.* quw qnul nijaʔ mariʔ s~ɕa zik na zjawaʔ, *.* quw niwan rnaw nijaʔ s~ɕa ɣluw naħaʔ quw s~ɕinβil pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan nijaʔ kja. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Darrell Allums mhtu squ 1958 neng 9 gac 12 nici squ California. musa' mgsemong ppzyuwi' na mu' mari . kin wagiq nya ga 206 cm kin'usuw nya ga 100 kiro. socgyo sa California raygaku na UCLA. 1980 neng musa sa pwazyaw giqas na sensyn NBA. minmagal mthgiru' lga.maki' squw te 11 binkgan lalu' niya' ruw wal galun kya na Dallas Mavericks la. ryax niya' knaki' nya' sa Dallas Mavericks qutux kawas qasa ga, 2.7 tinsu' sinbil niya', 3.0 quw qnul niya' mari' sa zik na zyawa', 1.1 quw niwan rnaw niya' sa gluw naha' quw sinbil pincyuwagan niya' kya. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *arrell allums~ɕ mħtu s~ɕqu **** neŋ * ɣaʦ~ʨ ** niʦ~ʨi s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨali*ornia. mus~ɕaʔ mɣs~ɕemoŋ ppzjuwiʔ na muʔ mari . kin waɣiq nja ɣa *** ʦ~ʨm kinʔus~ɕuw nja ɣa *** kiro. s~ɕoʦ~ʨɣjo s~ɕa ʦ~ʨali*ornia rajɣaku na uʦ~ʨla. **** neŋ mus~ɕa s~ɕa pwazjaw ɣiqas~ɕ na s~ɕens~ɕjn nβa. minmaɣal mtħɣiruʔ lɣa.makiʔ s~ɕquw te ** βinkɣan laluʔ nijaʔ ruw wal ɣalun kja na *allas~ɕ ma*eriʦ~ʨks~ɕ la. rjax nijaʔ knakiʔ njaʔ s~ɕa *allas~ɕ ma*eriʦ~ʨks~ɕ qutux kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa ɣa, *.* tins~ɕuʔ s~ɕinβil nijaʔ, *.* quw qnul nijaʔ mariʔ s~ɕa zik na zjawaʔ, *.* quw niwan rnaw nijaʔ s~ɕa ɣluw naħaʔ quw s~ɕinβil pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan nijaʔ kja. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
